title: When May I Help You?
subtitle: Publication · RO-MAN 2026
summary: When May I Help You? On the Effect of Proactivity on Group Human-Robot Collaboration. IEEE International Conference on Robot & Human Interactive Communication. Authors: T. Vitry, V. Maeder, K. Edgeworth, A. Hazaiti, et al.

title: PoSyMed4U
subtitle: Population Systems Medicine Platform
summary: Personalized medicine platform for patient stratification using gene-expression data. Integrates BiCoN, DysRegNet, MoSBi, UnPaSt, SCANet, Spycone, and Geneformer models behind a one-click research interface.

title: Sephora — Backend Testing & Bulk Ops
subtitle: ThoughtWorks · E-commerce
summary: Supplemented backend with extensive unit and integration tests; built EasyExcel templates enabling bulk data uploads and modifications for business teams.

title: Electrolux — Retail Migration
subtitle: ThoughtWorks · Tech Lead & Developer
summary: Led the project discovery phase, provided technical solutions and PoCs, migrated production data to a new VTEX-based retail web store, and mentored newcomers while establishing the codebase scaffold.

title: Standard Chartered — NextGen Auth
subtitle: ThoughtWorks · Banking Security
summary: Identity & access management modernization. Built SMS OTP, biometric login, and session management on OAuth2 + WebAuthn. Later transitioned to the security team to remediate vulnerabilities across global IT deployments.

title: Our Marriage Journey
subtitle: ThoughtWorks · Government Public Service
summary: Frontend and backend feature development on a microservice-architected portal serving multi-million users. Cross-functional team with UX, QA, and engineering.

title: Data Engineering Accelerated
subtitle: ThoughtWorks Training
summary: End-to-end data engineering ecosystem training. Hands-on Apache Spark on Databricks, big data architectures, and ThoughtWorks data offerings.

title: ThoughtWorks University
subtitle: ThoughtWorks Training
summary: Intensive training program for new graduates: software development practices in cross-functional teams, agile methodologies, and global consulting culture.

title: ChinaSoft Climate Visualization
subtitle: Internship
summary: Analyzed century-long climate data and produced geographically-grounded visualizations.
